title: Modular Machinery Reborn Energistics
description: Modular Machinery Reborn addon to integrate Applied Energistics 2
body:
Thid mod requires AE2 and Modular Machinery Reborn to be installed to be operational

 

The mod includes tiered, configurable tiers of any type of item and fluid input/output buses/hatches to allow for the creation of big multiblock machinery like Gregtech's Implosion Compressor, Vacuum Freezer, ... and whatever you might imagine integrated with applied energistics

 

If Modular Machinery Reborn Mekanism and Applied Mekanistics are prensent, it will have chemical input/output hatches.

If Modular Machinery Reborn Ars Nouveau and Ars Énergistique are prensent, it will have source input/output hatches.

 

This mod has an integration with the Modular Machinery Reborn recipe system in json and KubeJS.

 

Discord : For questions or support, join the Discord Server : https://discord.gg/2XCPCVa59h

 

You can see the Test Datapack for example machines and recipe json.

You can see the Test KubeJS server script for example machine and recipe using kubejs
